steps.action: Run cargo test and grep for svg test names
steps.expected: Unit tests covering M, L, C, Z (absolute and relative) parsing
steps.observed: 22 parsing tests pass: svg_parse_moveto_absolute, svg_parse_moveto_relative, svg_parse_moveto_lineto_absolute, svg_parse_lineto_relative_resolves_against_current, svg_parse_cubic_absolute, svg_parse_cubic_relative, svg_parse_close_path, svg_parse_close_lowercase, svg_parse_implicit_lineto_after_moveto, svg_parse_implicit_lineto_after_relative_moveto, svg_parse_multiple_subpaths, svg_parse_triangle, svg_parse_relative_moveto_chain, svg_parse_negative_coords, svg_parse_comma_separated_coords, svg_parse_multiple_spaces_between_coords, svg_parse_no_space_between_command_and_number, svg_parse_decimal_coords_truncated_to_integer. All M/m, L/l, C/c, Z/z variants covered with relative coordinate resolution.

evidence.testOutput: 22 SVG parsing tests passed, 0 failed. Covers absolute and relative variants of M, L, C, Z commands.

steps.action: Run cargo test and grep for svg rasterize test names
steps.observed: 7 rasterization tests pass: svg_rasterize_filled_square, svg_rasterize_triangle, svg_rasterize_antialiased_edges, svg_rasterize_winding_rule_nonzero, svg_rasterize_with_cubic_produces_coverage, svg_rasterize_scaled_shape, svg_rasterize_with_offset. Plus 5 icon-specific tests: svg_icon_doc_parses_successfully, svg_icon_doc_rasterizes_at_20x24, svg_icon_doc_rasterizes_scaled_for_chrome, svg_icon_doc_has_antialiased_diagonal, svg_icon_doc_has_text_line_holes.

evidence.testOutput: 12 SVG rasterization/icon tests passed, 0 failed. Coverage-map antialiasing and non-zero winding rule verified.

steps.expected: SVG icon visible in title bar chrome
steps.observed: Document icon (page with text lines pictograph) visible in title bar, left of 'Document OS' text. Icon is approximately 20x24 logical pixels with antialiased edges. Clearly recognizable as a document/page symbol — shows a rectangular page outline with horizontal lines suggesting text content. Rendered with blue-grey tint (CHROME_ICON color: rgb(180,190,220)) matching the chrome palette.

screenshots: qemu-screen-boot.png (high-quality view showing SVG document icon in title bar chrome)
evidence.testOutput: 5 svg_icon_doc_* unit tests pass verifying parsing, rasterization at target size, antialiased diagonals, and text-line detail.

steps.action: Run cargo test and grep for svg error-handling tests
steps.expected: Tests for empty, invalid command, missing coords — all return Err, none panic
steps.observed: 4 error-handling tests pass: svg_parse_empty_string_returns_error, svg_parse_whitespace_only_returns_error, svg_parse_invalid_command_returns_error, svg_parse_missing_coordinates_returns_error, svg_parse_missing_cubic_coords_returns_error, svg_rasterize_empty_path_returns_error. All return Err, none panic.

evidence.testOutput: 6 error-handling tests passed. Covers empty data, whitespace-only, invalid command letter, missing coordinates for L and C commands, empty path rasterization.

summary: All 4 SVG assertions pass. 36 total SVG tests cover parsing (M/m, L/l, C/c, Z/z with relative resolution), rasterization (filled shapes, antialiasing, winding rule, cubics), icon rendering (document icon at 20x24 with antialiased edges), and error handling (empty/invalid/missing input all return Err). Visual screenshot confirms SVG document icon in title bar chrome.
